title: Dungeons PBR
description: PBR textures for Dungeons Style resource pack !
body:
![Dungeons PBR logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c38366d0798d2201f35501f7c319c908e681ca9.png)
-----------

This resource pack adds PBR textures for [Dungeons Style](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dungeons-style) !

You have to place it above the default Dungeons Style in the resource pack list

I also use Neapik RTX resource pack, placed below Dungeons Style to get PBR on unchanged blocks
